headline: PDRM Reform: 70% of 150 Recommendations Still Pending
context: Seven years after 2019 reform report 70% of 150 recommendations remain unimplemented including independent complaints commission.

cards.big: 70% of 150 PDRM reform recommendations unimplemented after 7 years
cards.sub: Independent police complaints commission remains most significant pending reform

cards.big: IPCMC bill tabled 2020 replaced with weaker IPCC without enforcement powers
cards.sub: IPCC received 3,200 complaints in 2025 but could only recommend action

cards.big: Custodial deaths reached 85 in 2025 with only 12 resulting in charges
cards.sub: SUHAKAM documented 28 cases where cause of death inconsistent with official accounts

cards.big: Police misconduct complaints rose 35% to 8,400 but dismissals totalled 48
cards.sub: Internal affairs investigated 1,200 cases with 72% resulting in no action

cards.big: Reform stagnation tests whether police accountability requires external enforcement
70% of 150 PDRM reform recommendations still pending after 5 years. Police reform needs deadlines, not suggestions.
